name: lamindb
tagline: Domain skill for LaminDB, a lineage-tracking data lakehouse for biological datasets, covering setup, querying, curation, ontologies, and thi
verdict: Clean, well-scoped reference skill. It has an explicit 'Safety and Security Defaults' section forbidding credential display/logging and requiring pinned installs, all shell/install commands are plain `uv pip install`/`lamin` CLI calls with no piping fetched code into a shell, and every claim stays within the stated LaminDB domain. Minor gaps: no explicit 'wh

highlights.summary: No explicit 'do not use when' / negative-trigger guidance anywhere in the file, so an agent could apply it outside its intended scope.
Failure-path handling ('troubleshooting') is deferred to `references/setup-deployment.md`, which was not fetched/available for this review, so it can't be verified as adequate.
